positive: A highly detailed, centralized illustration of a majestic bioluminescent forest scene. The main subjects are stylized geometric flora and fauna integrated with celestial elements, such as crescent moons and nebula swirls. Use a vibrant, moody color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric teal, lavender, and accented by glowing gold and lime green bioluminescence. The composition should be symmetrical and framed, allowing for excellent negative space on edges. Style: Intricate Art Deco fantasy meeting high-contrast linework and stained glass textures. Minimal background texture, maximum visual impact, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, cross-eyed, muddy colors, solid blocks of color
